## GetVariablesResponse

**Type**: OCPP 2.0.1 Message Schema (Response)
**Base Message**: GetVariables

### Properties

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| customData | CustomDataType | No | This class does not get 'AdditionalProperties = false' in the schema generation, so it can be extended with arbitrary JSON properties to allow adding custom data. |
| getVariableResult | array<GetVariableResultType> | Yes |  |

      ]

    "AttributeEnumType": {
      "description": "Attribute type for which value is requested. When absent, default Actual is assumed.\r\n",
